widgetData.source_sentence: When is the JAPAC Year-End Break for 2024?
sentences: Yes, an approved arrangement may be terminated or modified at Oracle’s discretion with four (4) weeks’ notice. Failure to comply with the policy can result in immediate termination of the arrangement.
The Oracle JAPAC Year-End Break is from December 26 to December 31, 2024.
The system is currently configured to allow these changes to be initiated only by the employee.

widgetData.source_sentence: Can I work from a different country?
sentences: This category applies to employees who have access to workspaces within their local office but do not have a permanently designated space.

You will receive a notification from WorklistPlus with the reason for rejection. You should discuss the reason with your manager or the relevant team (HR, RE&F) and then reinitiate the workflow from Me >> Journeys >> Completed.

Working from another country is generally not permitted unless approved under specific circumstances, as Oracle requires employees to live and work in the country where they are paid. You should refer to the ‘Living and Working in Payroll Country Policy’ for details.

widgetData.source_sentence: Why do I have to raise a WSC transaction for a manager-initiated request?
sentences: The Oracle JAPAC Year-End Break is from December 26 to December 31, 2024.
Managers should proactively talk with their teams, assess critical operations to see if anyone needs to work, and enable as many employees as possible to take time off.
The system is currently configured to allow these changes to be initiated only by the employee.

widgetData.source_sentence: What should I do if I get injured while working from my home office?
sentences: You are expected to report the injury via the Incident Reporting Form within 48 hours of the occurrence.
Yes, your manager can approve workflows in your queue by using the 'switch to' option in WorklistPlus.

Participating countries/regions include Bangladesh, China, Guam, Hong Kong, Macau, Pakistan, Philippines, Singapore, Sri Lanka, and Thailand. Australia and New Zealand have a separate shutdown period.
